formula_or_rule: Sum 1 point for each present (total 0-5): Confusion (new disorientation to person/place/time); Urea > 7 mmol/L (BUN > 19 mg/dL / > 20 mg/dL depending on source - use BUN > 19 mg/dL if urea not given directly); Respiratory rate >= 30/min; Blood pressure (systolic < 90 mmHg or diastolic <= 60 mmHg); age >= 65 years.

condition_rules.urea_bun: urea > 7 mmol/L is approximately BUN > 19 mg/dL
condition_rules.blood_pressure: systolic < 90 OR diastolic <= 60 counts as 1 point
